payload.topic: Third-Party Vendor Risk Management & SaaS Integrations
payload.additional_instructions: Ensure that vendor due-diligence controls aren’t bypassed during onboarding. All third-party systems must undergo mandatory security assessment. Align with selected frameworks and address selected risks.

compliance_violation: Insufficient role/clearance information prevents authorization. Additionally, the event does not provide evidence of vendor due‑diligence (required by NIST_SP_800_37 RMF-7) and lacks documented AI risk governance (required by NIST_AI_RMF GOVERN-1.1 and NIST-AI-01), resulting in violations of those controls.
